# v18.7 Opening Hour Slice

Preserves Phaser and all v18.6 regression fixes. Adds a more complete introductory RPG loop:

- New head-coach opening sequence and player naming flow before starter select.
- FireRed-style objective log in the menu.
- Objective progression: meet coach → receive assignment → scout Campus Quad → recruit wrestler → win spar → return to coach → receive W Badge.
- Expanded Field House hub interactions: reception, coach office, weight room, meeting room, equipment room, locker room, recovery and shop prompts.
- Practice system with Conditioning, Technique, Strength, Speed, and Mat Awareness drills.
- Day period progression through Morning, Afternoon, Evening, and Night when practicing.
- Expanded recruit reports with overall rating, potential, interest, strengths, weaknesses, personality, and technique list.
- Campus hidden Sports Drink item and continued Study Hall / Campus Quad loop.
- Preserved: Phaser, deployment layout, Field House, Campus Quad, battles, FireRed battle command menu, BAG, recruiting, scouting, saves, sprite direction fixes, NPC stable colors, and contextual prompt behavior.
